creator: leonardo@schenkel.net
text:
Created attachment 163912
shar

I am the maintainer for sysutils/rcm and I would like to update it to the new upstream version 1.3.0.

Shar is attached. Diff is below:

diff --git a/sysutils/rcm/Makefile b/sysutils/rcm/Makefile
--- a/sysutils/rcm/Makefile
+++ b/sysutils/rcm/Makefile
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/sysutils/rcm/Makefile 372360 2014-11-09 12:05:46Z marino $
 
 PORTNAME=      rcm
-PORTVERSION=   1.2.3
+PORTVERSION=   1.3.0
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=  https://thoughtbot.github.io/rcm/dist/
 
diff --git a/sysutils/rcm/distinfo b/sysutils/rcm/distinfo
--- a/sysutils/rcm/distinfo
+++ b/sysutils/rcm/distinfo
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rcm-1.2.3.tar.gz) = 502fd44e567ed0cfd00fb89ccc257dac8d6eb5d003f121299b5294c01665973f
-SIZE (rcm-1.2.3.tar.gz) = 83947
+SHA256 (rcm-1.3.0.tar.gz) = ddcf638b367b0361d8e063c29fd573dbe1712d1b83e8d5b3a868e4aa45ffc847
+SIZE (rcm-1.3.0.tar.gz) = 107868
